query: SELECT id, category_name, brand_name, subtype_code, active FROM product_categories WHERE category_name LIKE '%耳機%' OR category_name LIKE '%音響%' OR brand_name LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY category_name, brand_name, id; SELECT id, category_name, brand_name, label, active, source_row_number FROM product_name_catalog_entries WHERE category_name LIKE '%耳機%' OR category_name LIKE '%音響%' OR brand_name LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY category_name, brand_name, source_row_number LIMIT 200;
